## 🔄 Type of Change

<!-- Put an `x` inside the brackets that apply. -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (a change that fixes a broken behaviour without adding new features)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (a change that adds new functionality)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation (improvements to README, comments, or policy pages)
- [ ] 🎨 Style / UI (visual changes that don't affect logic)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (code restructuring with no behaviour change)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix (please also file a private advisory if not already done)
- [ ] 🧰 Chore (dependency update, tooling, configuration)

## ✅ Checklist

<!-- Please confirm each item before requesting review. -->

- [ ] My changes are limited in scope — this PR addresses one issue or feature.
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and followed the project conventions.
- [ ] I have tested manually in at least one modern browser and the app works as expected.
- [ ] I have not introduced `Math.random()` for any security-sensitive operation (always use `crypto.getRandomValues()`).
- [ ] I have not introduced new external dependencies without prior discussion in an issue.
- [ ] My code does not include any credentials, API keys, personal data, or tracking code.
- [ ] All generated credentials remain processed **locally** — nothing is transmitted externally.
- [ ] I have updated or added relevant documentation / code comments where appropriate.
- [ ] The changes are compatible with the **GPLv3** license.
